description: Backend data contract for Timetable Management page – class timetables, teacher availability, swaps, overrides, validation, approval, and export.

getTimetableData.description: Fetch full timetable configuration: base timetable, teacher availability, approval status, and list of classes/teachers/subjects.

timetable.description: Base timetable structure: class -> day -> periodId -> { subject, teacher, room, isLab }

dayOverrides.expiresAt: datetime (optional, for single-day override, null means permanent until removed)

teacherAvailability.description: Per teacher, per day: available, maxPeriods, unavailablePeriods (array of period IDs)

updateBaseTimetable.description: Update the base timetable (full replace or partial). Requires timetable not approved.

requestBody.timetable: object (same structure as getTimetableData.timetable) – can be partial merge if desired

updateTimetableCell.description: Update a single cell in the base timetable (change teacher, subject, etc.).

createDayOverride.description: Create a temporary override for a specific class, day, period (e.g., substitute teacher for a day).

requestBody.subject: string (optional)
requestBody.expiresAt: datetime (optional, if omitted, override applies indefinitely unless deleted)

createLongTermSwap.description: Create a long-term teacher swap (replacement for a date range).

updateTeacherAvailability.description: Update teacher availability (full replace or partial).

generateTimetable.description: Trigger automatic generation of timetable based on current constraints (teachers, subjects, availability).

options.preserveExisting: boolean (default false, if true, tries to keep existing assignments where possible)

getGenerationStatus.description: Check status of a generation job.

validateTimetable.description: Run server-side validation on the current timetable (or a provided one). Returns list of issues (error/warning).

requestBody.timetable: object (optional, if omitted, uses current stored timetable)

approveTimetable.description: Lock the timetable (set approved=true). After approval, no modifications are allowed via API unless explicitly overridden.

exportTimetable.description: Export timetable in requested format (PDF, CSV, Excel).

notifyTeachers.description: Send notification (email/push) to teachers about timetable changes (usually after approval).

fieldNotes.approved: When true, base timetable cannot be modified. Day overrides and long-term swaps may still be allowed (depending on school policy).
fieldNotes.dayOverrides: Used for temporary substitutions (e.g., teacher absent for a day). Override takes precedence over base timetable and long-term swaps for that specific day/period. If expiresAt is null, override remains active until manually deleted.
fieldNotes.longTermSwaps: Replaces a teacher with a substitute for a date range. Applied during timetable lookups for the duration. Overrides have higher priority than swaps.
fieldNotes.teacherAvailability.maxPeriods: Hard limit on number of periods a teacher can teach per day.
fieldNotes.teacherAvailability.unavailablePeriods: Specific period IDs (1-8) where teacher cannot teach (e.g., free period).
fieldNotes.periodSlots: Defined by school configuration; includes breaks (type='BREAK') which are not editable. Frontend uses this to build the grid.
fieldNotes.subjects: List of all subjects available in the school – referenced in timetable cells.
